creator: ken@ixsystems.com
text:
Created attachment 178675
1.1.0 to 1.2.0 Diff

Update the x11/lumina port to the latest upstream version (1.2.0-p1), and fix up the port options.

Changes:
* Update Lumina to 1.2.0-p1 (includes new utility - lumina-archiver)
* Clean up some XCB/Qt dependencies
* New port options: 
  - I18N (enabled by default): install localization files - conflicts with obsolete x11/lumina-i18n port
  - DEBUG (disabled by default): preserve debugging symbols in binaries
